remaining_params.StackDescription: REP Scry_{p:You} scries & you may_they may & your_their & put_{p:You} puts & . Activate only if an opponent controls at least two more lands than you._.
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Scry 1, then you may reveal the top card of your library. If a basic land card is revealed this way, put it onto the battlefield tapped. Activate only if an opponent controls at least two more lands than you.
